input.tenant_message: The oven completely stopped working this morning. I set it to preheat to 350 and it never got warm — the display shows the temperature going up but when I check inside it's stone cold. The stovetop burners still work fine so it's just the oven part. I have a big family dinner planned for this weekend and I really need this fixed soon.

ai_output.recommended_action: Dispatch an appliance technician to inspect the oven bake element, broil element, and oven temperature sensor. The issue may be a failed heating element or faulty temperature probe — both are typically straightforward repairs. Prioritize scheduling before the weekend given the tenant's timeline.
